properties.name: flex.schedule.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the flex schedule auto-configuration.

properties.name: flex.schedule.pool-size
properties.description: Number of threads in the scheduler pool.

properties.name: flex.schedule.thread-name-prefix
properties.description: Prefix for thread names created by the scheduler pool.

properties.name: flex.schedule.remove-on-cancel
properties.description: Whether cancelled tasks should be removed from the thread pool queue immediately.

properties.name: flex.schedule.await-termination-seconds
properties.description: Maximum seconds to wait for in-flight tasks to complete during graceful shutdown.

properties.name: flex.schedule.endpoint.write-enabled
properties.description: Enable write operations (POST/DELETE) on the actuator endpoint. Disabled by default for security.

properties.name: flex.schedule.endpoint.allowed-beans
properties.description: Allowlist of bean names that can be scheduled via the actuator endpoint. Empty set means all beans are allowed.
